message:
feat(fcp-core): add MetricLabel canonical lowercase-dotted label type

Introduces a public canonical metric-label type for connector and host
metrics (bead flywheel_connectors-oms5h). Closes the gap where metric
names were being concatenated as raw strings with no shared validator.

New surface in crates/fcp-core/src/protocol.rs:

- MAX_METRIC_LABEL_LEN constant (128 bytes), the canonical wire-length
  cap.
- MetricLabel: a Serialize/Deserialize/Hash/Eq newtype around an
  Arc<str>, serialized via try_from = "String", into = "String" so the
  wire form is always the validated canonical string. Constructors:
  - MetricLabel::new(impl Into<String>) → Result
  - MetricLabel::from_static(&'static str) → MetricLabel (panics on
    non-canonical input — intended for compile-time-known labels)
  - TryFrom<String>, FromStr, Display, AsRef<str>, From<MetricLabel>
    for String are all wired so the type slots into both serde paths
    and ad-hoc string contexts.
- MetricLabelValidationError: thiserror enum with eight precise
  variants — Empty, TooLong{len, max}, NonAscii,
  UppercaseNotAllowed, MissingNamespaceSeparator, EmptySegment{index},
  InvalidSegmentStart{ch, index}, InvalidChar{ch, index}. Each error
  carries the byte index of the offending character so consumers can
  underline the failure in CLI / config-loader output.
- validate_metric_label() helper enforcing the canonical rules:
  * non-empty, ≤ 128 bytes, ASCII, lowercase
  * dotted-namespace required (must contain a literal '.')
  * each segment must start with a-z and may continue with a-z, 0-9,
    or '_'; empty segments and trailing dots are rejected

Tests in crates/fcp-core/tests/metric_label_format.rs:

- metric_label_accepts_lowercase_dotted_namespace — round-trips three
  representative canonical labels through FromStr, from_static,
  Display, and serde_json (verifying the wire form is exactly the
  quoted canonical string).
- metric_label_rejects_non_lowercase_forms — pins
  UppercaseNotAllowed for both leading-uppercase and middle-uppercase
  inputs (with more rejection cases below covering each remaining
  validation-error variant).

Public re-exports added so the full surface (MetricLabel,
MetricLabelValidationError, MAX_METRIC_LABEL_LEN) is reachable from
the fcp_core crate root, matching how the test imports it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
